contexts.context: …like names that are noun-phrases, not <mark>verb</mark> phrases.
…We do have some function names that are imperative <mark>verbs</mark>…we aren’t consistent.
…I was reluctant to use the copy-modify <mark>verb</mark> because people need to realize this doesn’t involve a…
